user.title: MMO Bridge
user.description:
MMO Bridge creates a secure webhook for your Second Life LSL scripts to connect to Home Assistant.

No configuration is needed — click **Submit** to set up.

Once set up, click **Configure** on the integration card to retrieve your webhook URL.

init.title: Webhook URL
init.description:
Copy this URL into your LSL Hub and Node scripts (the `seturl` command):

`{webhook_url}`

Keep this URL private — anyone with it can send presence and trigger events to your Home Assistant.
